title: Solus Tecnologia em Sistemas LTDA ransomware incident

extortion.description: www.solustecnologia.com https://www.zoominfo.com/c/solus-tecnologia-em-sistemas-ltda/462475393 Solus Tecnologia specializes in security monitoring by developing and installing closed-circuit television (CCTV) systems. They offer comprehensive and efficient access control solutions and provide structured cabling services ensuring optimal performance and organization of network infrastructure. Additionally, they cater to various telecommunication needs, from simple to complex installations. Since 2000, their main goal has been to meet client expectations, providing comfort, peace of mind, and security.
